title: Program
description: A bureau, unit, or initiative of the Manhattan District Attorney's Office — the office's 'Our Work' offering (e.g. Community Partnerships Unit, Gun Violence, Hate Crimes, White Collar Crime, Reform & Fairness, Post-Conviction Justice / conviction integrity, diversion programs). Reverse-engineered from manhattanda.org/our-work; there is NO structured data source, so this is a design-first schema that turns HTML program pages into a resource.

summary.description: Short description of the program's mandate.

isConvictionIntegrity.description: True for post-conviction justice / conviction integrity work.
